name: cache layer: second run on unchanged file emits cache_status=hit and skips rule.create
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" --report-format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"cache_status":"hit"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
